message:
fix(database): apply actual backoff delay in transaction retry helpers

All three with_*_transaction_retry functions computed exponential backoff
delays via RetryPolicy::delay_for() but only called yield_now(), providing
zero actual delay. Under contention (serialization failures, deadlocks,
SQLITE_BUSY), retries fired immediately without backoff, worsening the
very contention they were meant to mitigate.

Use sleep(wall_now(), delay) for non-zero delays so the configured
base_delay and max_delay are actually honored.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
